focus: [MON-B9/D6] designer-skills-main residual craft converted into sk-design D1/D3 craft-stress proof fixtures

graphEvents.label: Which designer-skills-main residual craft patterns should become sk-design routing and utilization fixtures?
designer-skills-main exposes a finite-state matrix shape for interactive UI proof that sk-design does not currently hard-gate
Readable measure and information density need measured proof fields, not only principle mentions
Broad i18n is already known, but sk-design lacks a conditional locale-stress proof branch for global or RTL component work
Lane C skill-benchmark can enforce these craft deltas through public/private routing and utilization fixtures
Craft proof lanes should fire only when the prompt creates or evaluates the relevant surface: interactive state, content density, or locale stress
D1/D3 craft-stress fixtures must use domain prompts publicly and keep expected modes/resources/proof fields in private gold

label: Interactive UI build and redesign work needs a conditional state/event/transition proof matrix
enforceable: Require state, event, transition, guard, impossible-state, UI-representation, loading-duration, recovery, a11y-announcement, and reduced-motion fields when interactive async flows are built or evaluated; replay route/resource expectations in Lane C.
advisory: Whether the modeled flow feels right and uses the best recovery pattern remains design judgment.

label: Measure and density should be proof-card fields with actual line-length and cognitive-load evidence
enforceable: For content-heavy surfaces, require representative paragraph, charactersPerLine, maxWidth, lineHeight, textExpansionCase, visibleDecisionCount, primaryTask, buriedCriticalInfo, progressiveDisclosureDecision, and densityVerdict fields.
advisory: Cognitive-load and prioritization quality require human/product judgment beyond field presence.

label: Global, multilingual, and RTL work needs a conditional locale-stress proof branch
enforceable: Require expansion locale/budget, RTL locale, logical property checks, icon mirroring classification, text-align:start, locale-aware date/number/currency formatter, token directionality, and component-doc locale note fields when locale stress is in scope.
advisory: Cultural color/icon semantics and market appropriateness remain advisory unless backed by actual market evidence.

label: The enforcement path is a Lane C sk-design craft-stress fixture set with private expected modes/resources/proof fields
enforceable: Add public/private fixture pairs for stateful async flow, dense dashboard readability, and global component locale stress; score D1-intra, D2, D3, and D5 through existing Lane C router-replay and structural gates.
advisory: D4-R live task usefulness remains advisory until an opt-in live ablation runs.

label: State, density, and locale proof lanes must be conditional on prompt/surface scope so narrow advice does not over-load sk-design
Craft-stress fixtures must keep public prompts in domain language and private gold must own modes/resources/proof fields

direction: Treat broad i18n or broad line-length guidance as net-new from designer-skills-main
reason: impeccable and current sk-design already contain broad i18n, RTL, text expansion, and readable-measure guidance; the fresh delta is conditional proof fields plus Lane C route/utilization fixtures.
